title: Fablebound
description: "Fablebound" is a fantasy survival modpack where magic and myth shape the world. Explore enchanted forests, fight strange creatures, and build your own story in a land of forgotten fables.
body:
# Fablebound

Fablebound is a fantasy survival modpack built for players who want a rich, immersive world where every choice matters. Struggle through harsh winters, master spellcraft, battle terrifying monsters and maybe, if you're lucky, build something worth calling home.

What to expect:
A real survival experience. Mods like Tough As Nails and Serene Seasons make the world feel truly wild. Stay warm, stay hydrated, and prepare for every season or it might be your last.

Magic that grows with you. Using Ars Nouveau and Iron’s Spells & Spellbooks, you'll craft your own spells and slowly grow into a powerful spellcaster. Magic is something you earn, not something handed to you.

A dangerous, living world. With wildlife from Alex’s Mobs, terrifying bosses from Cataclysm, and twisted creatures from Born in Chaos, exploration is always risky but never dull.

Dungeons worth exploring. Thanks to YUNG’s Better Dungeons, Better Strongholds, and other structure mods, there’s always a new ruin, vault, or ancient stronghold waiting to be uncovered.

Real cooking and cozy living. Survival is more than combat. Grow crops, cook meals with Farmer’s Delight and its add-ons, and decorate your home with Another Furniture, Macaw’s, and Handcrafted.

Fablebound is for players who want fantasy that feels grounded. It’s not about rushing it's about growing, exploring, and surviving in a world full of magic, mystery, and danger.

Find shelter. Learn magic. Explore the unknown.

You're bound for something more.
## Issues
All issues are currently handled over on github. If you find any bugs or run in to any issues feel free to create an issue. 

## !!! STILL IN ~~ALPHA~~ BETA !!!
This modpack is still in ~~alpha~~ beta, that means that there may be conflicts, things that are not working or even crashes.

## Credit for none modrinth mods 
some mods used in the pack are not available on modrinth, they are the following: 
- [Aquaculture 2 (forge 1.20.1)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture)
- [Born in Chaos (forge 1.20.1)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos)
